feature: UI Overhaul - Button Enhancement & Layout Fixes

tasks.title: Update Design System CSS Variables for Enhanced Button Styling
tasks.description: Add new CSS variables to design-system.css to support enhanced button styling with higher contrast borders and touch-friendly sizing. This establishes the foundation for improved button visibility and accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: New CSS variable --button-min-size: 48px added to design-system.css
New CSS variable --button-border-width: 3px added (increased from 2px)
New CSS variable --button-padding-x: 1.5rem added
New CSS variable --button-padding-y: 0.75rem added
Enhanced neon border variables with higher opacity values
All new variables follow existing naming conventions
No breaking changes to existing styles

tasks.title: Enhance NeonButton Component for Touch-Friendly Sizing and Contrast
tasks.description: Update NeonButton component to use new design system variables for improved visibility and touch accessibility. Increase minimum button size to 48x48px, add thicker borders, and enhance visual contrast.
acceptanceCriteria: Button minimum size is 48x48px (touch-friendly)
Replace px-6 py-3 with new CSS variables (--button-padding-x, --button-padding-y)
Border width increased to 3px using --button-border-width
Higher contrast between button states (default, hover, active, disabled)
Neon glow effect is more prominent and visible
All color variants (cyan, magenta, purple) have enhanced visibility
Ripple effect still works correctly with new sizing
Disabled state remains clearly distinguishable
TypeScript types remain unchanged
All existing props work as before

tasks.title: Apply Consistent Spacing to GameInfo Component Layout
tasks.description: Refactor GameInfo component to use design system spacing variables for consistent padding, alignment, and visual hierarchy. Improve organization of game controls and status information.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded spacing values with CSS variables (--spacing-*)
Consistent padding throughout component using design system values
Proper alignment of player indicator, status text, and reset button
Responsive spacing that works on mobile and desktop
Winner/draw state displays maintain visual hierarchy
All animations continue to work smoothly
Component remains within GlassCard boundaries
No layout shifts between game states

tasks.title: Apply Consistent Spacing to MultiplayerGameInfo Component Layout
tasks.description: Refactor MultiplayerGameInfo component to use design system spacing variables. Ensure consistent layout organization across all multiplayer game states (waiting, playing, spectating, disconnected).
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded spacing with CSS variables throughout component
Consistent padding in all game state cards (opponent disconnected, turn indicator, game over)
Proper alignment of status badges, player indicators, and buttons
Responsive spacing for mobile and desktop
Disconnection warning maintains visual prominence with new spacing
Spectator mode layout uses consistent spacing
All animation states (victory, defeat, draw) display correctly
No layout shifts between states
Turn indicator arrow animation works with new spacing

tasks.title: Fix SinglePlayerPage Layout Spacing and Padding
tasks.description: Optimize SinglePlayerPage layout to use design system spacing variables. Replace excessive top padding (pt-48) with organized, consistent spacing that properly accommodates the fixed header.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace pt-48 with calculated header height + design system spacing
Use CSS variables for all spacing values
No overlap between fixed header and main content
Consistent gap between left (flat boards) and right (3D view) panels
Responsive padding that works on all screen sizes
Smooth scrolling in flat boards panel
No layout shifts when game state changes
Back button, title, and game info remain properly positioned in fixed header

tasks.title: Fix HomePage Grid Layout to Prevent Section Overlap
tasks.description: Change HomePage game mode cards from two-column grid to single-column stack layout on ALL screen sizes to prevent overlapping between SINGLE PLAYER and MULTIPLAYER sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8' with 'grid grid-cols-1 gap-12'
Single column layout on all screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
No overlap between SINGLE PLAYER and MULTIPLAYER cards
Increased gap (gap-12 = 3rem) for better visual separation
Cards maintain proper glassmorphism styling
Animations still work (float, card variants)
Cards remain centered on page
Responsive design maintains consistent spacing

tasks.title: Create Accordion Component for How To Play Section
tasks.description: Build a reusable Accordion component using Framer Motion for smooth expand/collapse animations. Component will support collapsed-by-default state and programmatic control via button trigger.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Accordion.tsx component in src/components/ui/
Implements expand/collapse functionality with Framer Motion
Supports collapsed-by-default prop
Smooth height animation using AnimatePresence
Accepts trigger button as prop or uses default
Glassmorphism styling consistent with design system
Accessible keyboard navigation (Enter/Space to toggle)
ARIA attributes for screen readers (aria-expanded, aria-controls)
TypeScript interface with proper typing
Exports from src/components/ui/index.ts

tasks.title: Refactor HomePage How To Play Section to Use Accordion
tasks.description: Convert the existing How To Play section on HomePage to use the new Accordion component. Add a 'Show Rules' button that controls the accordion, with content collapsed by default.
acceptanceCriteria: How To Play section uses Accordion component
Content is collapsed by default on page load
NeonButton with 'SHOW RULES' / 'HIDE RULES' text controls accordion
Button text updates based on accordion state (open/closed)
Smooth animation when expanding/collapsing
All existing content (4 rule sections) displays correctly when expanded
Glassmorphism styling maintained
Button uses appropriate neon color (purple to match section title)
Responsive layout works on all screen sizes
Animation doesn't cause layout shift in page

criticalPath.description: Longest dependency chain determining minimum project duration

sprint1.name: Foundation & Critical Fixes
sprint1.focus: Fix critical layout issues and establish design system foundation

sprint2.name: Polish & UX Enhancement
sprint2.focus: Add accordion feature for better content organization

recommendations: Start TASK-001 and TASK-006 in parallel on Day 1
After TASK-001 completes, run TASK-002 and TASK-005 in parallel
After TASK-002 completes, run TASK-003 and TASK-004 in parallel
TASK-007 and TASK-008 must run sequentially in Sprint 2

criticalBottlenecks.mitigation: Prioritize completion, thorough validation before dependent tasks
